description:
A cross-platform context-aware key remapper


Changed
- On Windows the mouse is now also only hooked when it has mappings. One can add @grab-device mouse to further hook it unconditionally (#344).
- On Windows the devices are unhooked when the active context only contains Any >> Any (#351).
- keymapper-launchd also installs the Karabiner-DriverKit-VirtualHIDDevice daemon (#298).
- Updated Karabiner-DriverKit-VirtualHIDDevice to version 6.10.0.
Fixed
- Fixed expression Any to match all inputs (#351).
- Fixed string comparison blocks with empty strings (#334).
